subcodes.first_line: O cherished friend! Assuredly the letters have arrived, and now, as thou art the companion, confidant and heart's consolation of 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز البته نامه ها رسیده حال چون یار و ندیم و مونس جان و دل عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort
